title: Microcoelia smithii
taxonomy: Microcoelia smithii is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Microcoelia is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Microcoelia smithii is classified as a member of the subtribe Angraecinae. This classification is based on its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.
